name: html-to-elementor
description: Reproduce an existing HTML webpage as pixel-exact, editable Elementor custom widgets bundled in one WordPress plugin — fonts, spacing, colors, AND all animations/interactions intact (hovers, scroll-reveal, sliders, keyframes, JS). Lifts the source code verbatim rather than re-deriving; per-section editable widgets; full-page assembly; private-repo GitHub auto-updater.
